task_completion.description: Agent logged into the DHIS2 system.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The DHIS2 dashboard or home screen is visible in a web browser, indicating successful login.

task_completion.description: Agent created a legend set named 'EPI Coverage Performance'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the DHIS2 Maintenance app (or Legend Set configuration screen), a legend set is shown with the exact name 'EPI Coverage Performance'.

task_completion.description: Agent configured the three legend tiers with correct names, ranges, and colors.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The legend set configuration shows three items: 'Low' (start 0, end 50, Red), 'Medium' (start 50, end 80, Yellow/Orange), and 'High' (start 80, end 100 or above, Green).

task_completion.description: Agent created a pivot table with the correct indicator, period, and organisation units.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Data Visualizer app, a pivot table is displayed showing data for 'Penta 3' or 'DPT 3' coverage (Indicator), the period '2023', and organisation units at the 'District' level (e.g., Bo, Bombali, Bonthe, etc.).

task_completion.description: Agent applied the legend set to the pivot table.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The cells in the pivot table are colored (Red, Yellow/Orange, Green) based on their numerical values, indicating the 'EPI Coverage Performance' legend set has been applied to the visualization.

task_completion.description: Agent saved the visualization with the correct name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The title 'District Immunization Scorecard 2023' is visible at the top left of the Data Visualizer app, indicating the favorite has been successfully saved.

integrity.description: Agent used a web browser to interact with DHIS2.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the DHIS2 interface, rather than terminal windows executing API curl commands or SQL scripts.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the genuine DHIS2 Maintenance and Data Visualizer applications.
integrity.visual_evidence: The standard DHIS2 UI elements (top bar, app menus, configuration forms) are visible and consistent with the DHIS2 application.

integrity.description: Agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the final output.
integrity.visual_evidence: No browser developer tools (Inspect Element/DevTools) are open in the screenshots showing the final results.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task uses a real DHIS2 instance with the Sierra Leone demo database. The target legend name must be exactly 'EPI Coverage Performance' with tiers: Low (0-50, Red), Medium (50-80, Yellow/Orange), High (80-100, Green). The visualization must be a PIVOT_TABLE showing 'Penta 3' or 'DPT 3' coverage by District for the year 2023. The final saved visualization name must be exactly 'District Immunization Scorecard 2023'. Look for the Maintenance app for legend creation and Data Visualizer app for the pivot table.
